description: Perform an in silico DdeI restriction digest on wild-type and sickle cell mutant HBB amplicons located in ~/UGENE_Data/rflp_genotyping/ (hbb_wildtype_amplicon.fasta and hbb_mutant_amplicon.fasta). Export the annotated sequences as GenBank files to ~/UGENE_Data/rflp_genotyping/results/hbb_wildtype_ddei.gb and ~/UGENE_Data/rflp_genotyping/results/hbb_mutant_ddei.gb. Create a diagnostic report at ~/UGENE_Data/rflp_genotyping/results/genotyping_report.txt that includes the total number of DdeI restriction sites for each allele, the exact lengths (in base pairs) of the fragments produced for each, and a concluding statement comparing the restriction patterns of the two alleles.
